title: chore(deps): update dependency autoprefixer to v7.2.6 - autoclosed
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [autoprefixer](https://github.com/postcss/autoprefixer) from `v7.2.1` to `v7.2.6`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v7.2.2`](https://github.com/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​722)

* Fix `_autoprefixerDisabled is undefined` issue.

---

### [`v7.2.3`](https://github.com/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​723)

* Fix `grid-template-areas` in `@media` (by Evgeny Petukhov).

---

### [`v7.2.4`](https://github.com/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​724)

* Fix IE 10 support.

---

### [`v7.2.5`](https://github.com/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​725)

* Fix multiple prefixes in declaration value.

---

### [`v7.2.6`](https://github.com/postcss/autoprefixer/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​726)

* Fix `-ms-` prefix for grid cells with same `grid-area` (by Evgeny Petukhov).

---

</details>


<details>
